GOVERNANCE

On-chain votes & delegations

As a Stake Pool Operator and ADA holder, I participate in Cardano’s on-chain governance — voting on governance actions and delegating my voting power to trusted DReps.

Voting Record — as Operator (SPO)

Dec 2025 YES

Add Constitutional Committee

Voted in favour of establishing the Constitutional Committee, a key step in Cardano’s decentralised governance model.

Mar 2026 YES

Budget Process Framework

Supported establishing a transparent budget process for the Cardano treasury, giving the community control over on-chain funding.

Mar 2026 YES

Cardano Foundation as Managing Entity of Project Catalyst

Voted to appoint the Cardano Foundation as the new managing entity of Project Catalyst to ensure continuity and community trust.

DRep Delegation — as Holder / Staker

Mar 2026 DELEGATED

Delegated to DRep Peter Bui

Delegated my ADA holder voting power to Peter Bui, a trusted and active DRep in the Cardano governance ecosystem.

Back to Home
